title: polystichum caducum
intro: Polystichum caducum, also known as the deciduous fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polystichum caducum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
